svg.title: Training Gym SDK architecture on Modal
svg.desc: Local Training Gym SDK dispatches runs to a Framework Specific Setup on Modal containing a data buffer, custom rollout generation, an sglang router, a Megatron trainer with 4 GPUs, and two sglang inference servers with 2 GPUs each. The framework records runs and writes train results to a DB modal Volume. A Server reads the Volume to back the Dashboard, which the SDK uses to monitor results.
